raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "self-affirmation and declaration of intentional personal choices",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "environments can directly soothe or destabilize a nervous system",
    "peace is a selectable state achievable by boundary-setting",
    "personal 'frequency' exists as a stable, matchable property",
    "obligations and alignment are mutually exclusive categories",
    "resting in resonant spaces produces alignment"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "internally consistent within a self-help metaphorical frame; parallel structure reinforces thematic unity but relies on vague, non-falsifiable terms",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "the speaker treats the language as motivational scaffolding that prompts concrete, observable actions improving well-being without denying external constraints",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "the language is taken as literal mechanism, used to justify avoidance of responsibilities, or presented as empirical truth about frequencies or nervous-system effects"
}
